  "findings": [
    "System failed the vacuum decay test, indicating either a refrigerant leak or moisture/non-condensables remaining in the system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the system, perform a nitrogen pressure test to locate any leaks in the brazed joints, repair as necessary, and re-evacuate the system."
  ],
  "rationale": "A system that cannot hold a vacuum during a decay test fails to meet industry standards (ACCA, EPA 608, and OEM specifications). This indicates a leak or moisture contamination, which will compromise system performance, reliability, and environmental compliance.",

    "ACCA Quality Installation Standard (Standard 5)",
    "OEM Installation & Service Manual Specifications"
  ]
